title: Swedish Meat Balls
ingredients: 1 can Campbell’s cream of mushroom soup
instructions: Mix everything together except the soup. Roll into small balls and place in a lightly greased casserole pan. Heat the soup and water until combined. Pour over meatballs. Cook, covered for 350 degrees F for 20 minutes, reduce to 325 degrees and bake for 40 more minutes. Serve with noodles, rice or mashed potatoes.
